patch.value: GH-588: pm comment --message exits 0 recording nothing — comment invocation without any comment text must fail fast

GitHub issue #588: --message on the comments command is the history-message flag, not comment text; an invocation carrying no comment source (no positional text, no --add, no stdin/file) exits 0 with count:0 and records nothing. Fix = fail fast with actionable guidance (use --add/positional/stdin) or at minimum warn that only a history message was recorded.

Comment invocation with no comment text errors (or warns) with guidance naming --add/positional/stdin; exit code non-zero on the error path; contract + regression coverage; --message continues to set the history message when comment text is present
